title: Speed-to-value positioning resonates on 62% of discovery calls
anchor: April Gong sampling shows the refreshed message hierarchy landing across 17 of 27 sampled calls.
connect: Platform-consolidation frame appears on just 19% of calls over the same period.
body: April Gong sampling shows the refreshed message hierarchy landing across 17 of 27 sampled calls. Platform-consolidation frame appears on just 19% of calls over the same period.
trace: Speed-to-value frame showing strong pickup in discovery versus the secondary positioning angle.

title: ICP match rate climbs to 78% on new logos this quarter
anchor: Q2 new customer alignment sits at 28 of 36 closed deals versus 64% in Q1.
connect: ICP-aligned wins close 12 days faster than non-ICP deals on average.
body: Q2 new customer alignment sits at 28 of 36 closed deals versus 64% in Q1. ICP-aligned wins close 12 days faster than non-ICP deals on average.
trace: Strong improvement in customer fit with velocity benefit for aligned deals.

title: Beacon Systems battlecard utilization jumps to 61% of competitive deals
anchor: Q2 battlecard opens sit at 38 of 62 Beacon opportunities versus 22% in Q1.
connect: Head-to-head win rate versus Beacon runs at 63.6% currently versus 28% four-quarter average.
body: Q2 battlecard opens sit at 38 of 62 Beacon opportunities versus 22% in Q1. Head-to-head win rate versus Beacon runs at 63.6% currently versus 28% four-quarter average.
trace: Dramatic improvement in both battlecard adoption and competitive outcomes against primary competitor.

title: Verge IO appears in 24% of Q2 competitive opportunities
anchor: Verge showed up in 18 of 75 competitive deals this quarter versus 11% in Q1.
connect: Concentration runs highest in the mid-market segment where Atlas competes most.
body: Verge showed up in 18 of 75 competitive deals this quarter versus 11% in Q1. Concentration runs highest in the mid-market segment where Atlas competes most.
trace: Verge IO emergence in competitive landscape following Series B funding in March.

title: Northstar objection-handling update lifts win rate to 51%
anchor: Win rate on Northstar head-to-heads runs at 51% since the April 8 battlecard revision versus 42% before.
connect: Northstar mentions in Gong calls drop 22% in the four weeks following the update.
body: Win rate on Northstar head-to-heads runs at 51% since the April 8 battlecard revision versus 42% before. Northstar mentions in Gong calls drop 22% in the four weeks following the update.
trace: Battlecard enhancement correlating with improved competitive performance and reduced objection frequency.

title: CRM Sync launch generates $420K pipeline in first three weeks
anchor: April 8 launch pipeline sits at 14 new opportunities totaling $420K versus $310K from October's launch.
connect: Launch-attributable pipeline represents 18% of Q2 net new at $620K total.
body: April 8 launch pipeline sits at 14 new opportunities totaling $420K versus $310K from October's launch. Launch-attributable pipeline represents 18% of Q2 net new at $620K total.
trace: Strong launch performance with improved first-month pipeline generation versus prior product launch.

title: Launch enablement adoption reaches 71% across the sales team
anchor: April 8 launch assets opened by 27 of 38 reps in first 14 days versus 42% adoption on prior launch.
connect: Reps who opened launch assets generate 2.4x the pipeline of non-opening reps.
body: April 8 launch assets opened by 27 of 38 reps in first 14 days versus 42% adoption on prior launch. Reps who opened launch assets generate 2.4x the pipeline of non-opening reps.
trace: Improved sales enablement adoption with clear correlation between asset engagement and pipeline generation.

title: Forecast Pro launch clears readiness 10 days before ship date
anchor: May 15 launch readiness sits at 3 of 3 items with positioning brief signed off May 5.
connect: Prior launch positioning brief signed off just 2 days before ship date.
body: May 15 launch readiness sits at 3 of 3 items with positioning brief signed off May 5. Prior launch positioning brief signed off just 2 days before ship date.
trace: Significant improvement in launch preparation timeline with earlier positioning and enablement completion.

title: Earned media pickup rate reaches 42% on CRM Sync announcement
anchor: April 8 launch earned 22 of 53 outreached publications versus 28% pickup on prior launch.
connect: First-week launch-attributable pipeline runs at 2.0x the prior launch's first week.
body: April 8 launch earned 22 of 53 outreached publications versus 28% pickup on prior launch. First-week launch-attributable pipeline runs at 2.0x the prior launch's first week.
trace: Strong earned media performance correlating with accelerated early pipeline generation.

title: Enterprise inbound conversion lifts 8 points with new positioning
anchor: Q2 enterprise inbound-to-meeting conversion climbs with the refreshed speed-to-value message.
connect: Enterprise inbound pipeline with new positioning hook sits at $290K this quarter.
body: Q2 enterprise inbound-to-meeting conversion climbs with the refreshed speed-to-value message. Enterprise inbound pipeline with new positioning hook sits at $290K this quarter.
trace: Positioning refresh driving measurable improvement in enterprise segment inbound conversion rates.

title: Close reason capture rate reaches 92% across Q2 deals
anchor: Outcome reason capture sits at 47 of 51 closed deals versus 71% in Q1.
connect: Win rate intelligence now covers 92% of competitive outcomes versus prior quarter.
body: Outcome reason capture sits at 47 of 51 closed deals versus 71% in Q1. Win rate intelligence now covers 92% of competitive outcomes versus prior quarter.
trace: Significant improvement in sales team data hygiene providing better competitive outcome visibility.

title: Exit interview themes surface in 31% of Beacon competitive deals
anchor: April customer exit themes of implementation timeline and integration breadth appear across Beacon opportunities.
connect: Customer feedback produced 2 positioning themes from 14 exit interviews this month.
body: April customer exit themes of implementation timeline and integration breadth appear across Beacon opportunities. Customer feedback produced 2 positioning themes from 14 exit interviews this month.
trace: Customer success exit interview insights directly correlating with competitive objection patterns.

title: Mid-market close rates sit at 31% with refreshed speed-to-value message
anchor: Q2 mid-market performance on the new positioning hierarchy runs at 31% versus 13% in enterprise.
connect: Mid-market also shows highest Verge IO competitive concentration this quarter.
body: Q2 mid-market performance on the new positioning hierarchy runs at 31% versus 13% in enterprise. Mid-market also shows highest Verge IO competitive concentration this quarter.
trace: Clear segment differentiation in positioning effectiveness with mid-market showing stronger resonance.

title: Beacon Systems win rate climbs 35 points on refreshed battlecard
anchor: Current Beacon head-to-head performance sits at 63.6% versus 28% four-quarter average.
connect: Beacon competitive opportunities total 62 deals with 22 direct head-to-heads this quarter.
body: Current Beacon head-to-head performance sits at 63.6% versus 28% four-quarter average. Beacon competitive opportunities total 62 deals with 22 direct head-to-heads this quarter.
trace: Dramatic competitive performance improvement against primary competitor with strong deal volume.

title: Launch readiness timeline compresses by 8 days versus prior release
anchor: Forecast Pro positioning brief and battlecard updates cleared 10 days before ship versus 2 days on prior launch.
connect: Launch asset adoption improved to 71% on CRM Sync versus 42% historical baseline.
body: Forecast Pro positioning brief and battlecard updates cleared 10 days before ship versus 2 days on prior launch. Launch asset adoption improved to 71% on CRM Sync versus 42% historical baseline.
trace: Process improvement in launch preparation correlating with better sales team adoption of launch materials.

title: Platform consolidation frame appears on 19% of discovery calls
anchor: April Gong sampling shows platform-consolidation message landing on 5 of 27 calls.
connect: Speed-to-value frame captures 62% of the same call sample over the same period.
body: April Gong sampling shows platform-consolidation message landing on 5 of 27 calls. Speed-to-value frame captures 62% of the same call sample over the same period.
trace: Secondary positioning angle showing lower pickup rate in discovery calls versus primary message frame.

title: Customer feedback produces positioning revision themes
anchor: April exit interviews surface implementation timeline and integration breadth as positioning inputs.
connect: These themes correlate with objections in 31% of Beacon competitive opportunities.
body: April exit interviews surface implementation timeline and integration breadth as positioning inputs. These themes correlate with objections in 31% of Beacon competitive opportunities.
trace: Customer success intelligence directly informing competitive positioning with measurable objection correlation.

title: Verge IO competitive presence doubles following March funding round
anchor: Q2 Verge competitive deal appearance sits at 24% versus 11% in Q1 across 75 competitive opportunities.
connect: Verge IO raised $40M Series B on March 14 with mid-market segment focus matching Atlas.
body: Q2 Verge competitive deal appearance sits at 24% versus 11% in Q1 across 75 competitive opportunities. Verge IO raised $40M Series B on March 14 with mid-market segment focus matching Atlas.
trace: Clear correlation between competitor funding event and increased competitive deal presence in target segment.
